html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman

Moon Jelly is a Food Item that can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 5 Lucky Gold Nuggets.

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"yotr_food3"
“A jiggly treat.”
–Wilson
“Eww, it looks like a big jelly eyeball.”
–Willow
“Is funny wobble dessert.”
–Wolfgang
“I'm sorry Abigail, I'd share if I could.”
–Wendy
“THE MOON JELLY IS MINE”
–WX-78
“What a fascinating confection!”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like it's got a little snowcap on top.”
–Woodie
“A small piece of fruit, imprisoned in gelatin.”
–Maxwell
“A deliciöus sight indeed!”
–Wigfrid
“We kinda want to poke it.”
–Webber
“A feast for the eyes and my stomach.”
–Warly
“Looking?”
–Wormwood
“It looks like one of Warly's more fancy-pants desserts.”
–Winona
“A jelly ball. That is all.”
–Wortox
“That really okay for eating?”
–Wurt
“It's so jiggly!”
–Walter
“What a fashionable jelly dessert!”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thạch Mặt Trăng là một Vật Phẩm Thực Phẩm có thể kiếm được tại Đền Bunnyman với giá 5 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn.
